canonical_packaged_references.purpose: primary skill workflow rules including Shadow Observer launch contract

candidate-rule proposal contract for skill improvement passes
intake contract including production and observer modes
production-mode routing, director playbooks, and escalation triggers
world-class TVC principles, reference parity, attention choreography, and source map
reference examples for non-generic shot progression

notes: The project-root markdown files may remain as editable method-library notes, but the packaged skill must not depend on them.
When root references change, copy the updated versions into this skill and update the hashes before publishing.
Shadow Observer events and candidate rules are learning evidence, not automatic permission to mutate the skill.
Temporary-thread observer candidates remain draft evidence until accepted in the SSOT main thread.
